resources.string:
## Key Backup and Safety Tips
 

Your account don dey secured by secret key. Di key na long random string wey dey start with **nsec1**. Anybody wey get access to your secret key fit publish content using your identity.
 

- **No** put your secret key for any website or software wey you no trust.
 
- Amber developers **go never** ask you for your secret key.
 
- **Make you** keep secure backup of your secret key for account recovery. We dey recommend say you use password manager.
Secret key (nsec) don copy go clipboard
Event pubkey no equal di user wey dey login now
Logout go delete all your local information. Make sure say you don backup your private keys so you no go lose your account. You wan continue?

For extra security, you fit encrypt your key with password. Dis key dey start with **ncryptsec1** and you no fit use am without your password.
 

If you lose your password, you no go fit recover your key.
Fail to encrypt your private key
Biometrics fail to authenticate di owner of dis phone
Biometrics fail to authenticate di owner of dis phone. Error: %1$s
Why you no go explore your favourite nostr app small?
" Wan make you give am permission to read your public key and sign events for your behalf"

## Connect through Tor with Orbot
 

1. Install [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android)
 
2. Start Orbot
 
3. For Orbot, check di Socks port. Di default na 9050
 
4. If necessary, change di port for Orbot
 
5. Configure di Socks port for dis screen
 
6. Press di Activate button to use Orbot as proxy

1. Install [Orbot](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.torproject.android)
 
2. Start Orbot
 
3. For Orbot, check di Socks port. Di default na 9050
 
4. If necessary, change di port for Orbot
 
5. Configure di Socks port for dis screen
 
6. Press di Activate button to use Orbot as proxy
Your data go immediately transfer for regular network
Run Tor directly inside di app. No external app required.
E no fit connect to Tor
Product wey dem sell as auction
Notifications for Approving or Rejecting Bunker requests.
Authentication dey needed to use di app
Mapping Nostr keys to DNS-based internet identifiers
Basic key derivation from mnemonic seed phrase
E dey recommended for people wey like privacy and wan control each app. If you choose dis one, e go ask you set preference every time you try new app.
Make I approve nostr events automatically or you wan review dem for each app?
Dis words go allow you recreate your account if you lose access. Write dem down for safe place
Enter each word of your seed phrase in order. You fit also paste di full phrase using di clipboard button.
Use different index if dis mnemonic don dey used to create multiple accounts (m/44\'/1237\'/%1$d\'/0/0)
Ask me to approve each request.
Fail to send event to relay
Dis option allow you add nsecbunker manually, and use am with any app wey support Nostr Connect (NIP-46)
If your app dey offer you Nostr Connect QR Code you fit scan am from here. Usually dis login mode na web apps dem dey offer am.
If your app dey offer you Nostr Connect URL, you fit paste am here. Usually dis login mode na web apps dem dey offer am.

Usually Nostr applications get \"Login with Amber\" option wey allow you use Amber as external signer; when you press dat button Amber go open and dem go ask you to approve some permissions.\n\nBut you get other options to use Amber:

## IMPORTANT SECURITY NOTICE

You wan export **ALL** your Amber accounts. Dis file go contain your private keys.

- **Password protect** your export file with strong password
- **Store am securely** - treat am like your wallet
- **Never share** am with anybody
- **Delete** am from your device after you store am safely

**Anybody wey get access to dis file fit control ALL your accounts!**
Password must be at least 8 characters
You wan export %d accounts to encrypted file.
Dis file go contain all your private keys. Store am well!
Dis password dey encrypt your keys before uploading. You go need am to restore.
Password dey required to backup or restore
Save each account\'s encrypted key directly to Google Drive. No API key required.
Each account dey saved as im own {npub}.ncryptsec file. Android go ask where to save each one — choose Google Drive to send directly without storing anything for dis device.
Some accounts no fit save. Check your connection.
Enter di npub of di account wey you wan restore
Upload your encrypted backup to any WebDAV server (Nextcloud, ownCloud, etc.).
To create new nsecbunker you need to give am name and select one or more relays, na so e be!
Use dis url for your app:
Manage di app permissions by temporarily disabling or completely reverting dem. New permission dey added by di app when required.
To create new nsecbunker you need to give am name and select one or more relays, na so e be!
Notifications dey needed to use Amber as nsec bunker.
%1$s dey require some permissions, abeg review dem.
E dey require some permissions, abeg review dem.
%1$s dey require make you sign dis events wey related to %2$s permission.
Relay no support retrieving Bunker events. You wan add am anyway?
Manage di relays wey dey used to fetch your profile data
Manage di relays wey dey used for communicating with external applications
You go find am for your account section, so you no need to copy am right now.
Abeg add nickname, later you go fit personalise your full profile (bio, pic, etc) using your preferred Nostr client:
Setup Amber with your Nostr private key. You fit enter different versions: Nsec, Ncryptsec or Hex.\nYou fit also scan am from QR Code.
Dis na your public key, e be like username wey you fit share with anybody make dem find you for Nostr:
Congratulations, your new account don ready!\n

Now you fit start to use apps wey support Amber, when e dey needed Amber go open and ask you to confirm permissions.
For dis view you go find all di apps wey get active permissions.

Discover all Nostr apps for android for
Close application when accepting or rejecting permission
Dey delete old log entries from %1$s
Some applications fit no work if you try to reuse your bunker URI. Delete dis application and create new one if di login no dey work.
Tap to view and install di update
When you enable am, Amber go start im background service automatically after di device boot so remote login and NIP-46 requests go keep working.
Choose between stable and beta (pre-release) builds
Updates no dey available for dis build.
Discover more Nostr apps for android for
No lose access to your Nostr account! Create backup
Proxy no dey work. Check your proxy settings/application.
You sure say you wan remove all permissions from dis application?
You wan replace di existing connection \'%1$s\'? If you replace di existing connection di old application go stop working.
Fail to connect to relay/proxy. Check if you don enable di network permission for Amber
Kill Switch don enable, remote login and profile fetching no go work
You wan send di recent crash report to Amber for DM? No personal information go dey shared
You wan copy di crash report to your clipboard and open Client to send am to Amber?
Amber receive malformed nostrsigner request and e no fit process am. Abeg contact di client developer to report dis issue.
" wan encrypt dis list of tags with %1$s"
wan encrypt list of tags with %1$s
" wan read dis list of tags from %1$s encrypted content"
wan read list of tags from %1$s encrypted content
" wan read dis text from %1$s encrypted content"
wan read text from %1$s encrypted content
Encrypt dis list of tags with %1$s
Read dis list of tags from %1$s encrypted content
Read dis text from %1$s encrypted content
E no fit connect to relay. You wan add am anyway?
No leave di app until di key don generate
Amber na free and open source project\n
You wan send dis missing translation report to Amber for DM? You fit edit di message before you send am.
You wan copy dis missing translation report to your clipboard and open Client to send am to Amber? You fit edit di message before you send am.
wan read encrypted content with NIP-44 v3
When di whitelist no empty, relay client authentication (NIP-42) go only dey allowed for relays wey dey inside di list. Auth requests from other relays go dey rejected automatically.

One or more accounts no fit load because your device's secure storage (KeyStore) return error:

%1$s

Dis na known firmware bug for some devices where di system no fit upgrade stored encryption keys.

Wetin you fit do:
• If you get your nsec (private key) backed up, logout of di affected account and login back — dis go create new working key.
• Check for system firmware update from your device manufacturer, wey fit fix dis.
• No uninstall Amber; keeping di app installed dey preserve di possibility of recovery if firmware update come out.
Too many requests from %1$s — dey ignore am for now
When you enable am, Amber dey publish encrypted copy of your connected applications and their permissions to relays once a day so you fit restore dem for new device. Only you fit decrypt di backup.
Permissions for applications wey already dey exist for dis device go be replaced with di backed-up permissions. New applications from di backup go be added. Continue?
Found encrypted applications backup with %1$d applications and %2$d permissions. Restore now?
